name: openframe-cms
description: OpenFrame Central Management System — fleet view and remote control over MQTT

scripts.build:web: npm --prefix web install && npm --prefix web run build
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 test/registry.test.ts test/alerts.test.ts test/templates.test.ts test/history.test.ts test/logs.test.ts test/firmware-store.test.ts test/notifier.test.ts test/rate-limit.test.ts test/provision.test.ts test/auth.test.ts test/audit.test.ts test/jobs.test.ts test/integration.test.ts
